== Notes for [[Item:Q87558|Q87558]] ==

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Publius_Licinius_Crassus_(son_of_triumvir) Son of '''Tertulla''':

=Publius Licinius Crassus (son of triumvir)=
'''Publius Licinius Crassus''' (86?/82? BC – 53 BC) was one of two sons of the triumvir '''Marcus Licinius Crassus''' and '''Tertulla'''.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940B208E41EFBBE49822EF79916C93C3
geni:6000000002188289169

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
